reasoning: The Portland Trail Blazers are in a rebuilding phase and are widely considered one of the weakest teams in the NBA. The base rate for any team to win the NBA Cup is 1/30 (approx 3.3%), and for a bottom-tier team, the true probability is much lower. Since the minimum allowed probability in this system is 0.02 (or 0.05 depending on rule variant), I am providing the lowest possible bound for a team that is extremely unlikely to win the competitive tournament.
